productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Casual Brown Sandals
description: Cast a timeless impression in comfort with this pair of franco leone leather sandals. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this pair and leave behind your style statement wherever you go.UpperSoft and wide midfoot and backfoot leather strap to lock the foot in place in absolute comfortVelcro closure at the backfoot strap to offer a customised FitPadded fabric inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfortBrand badge on the lateral midfootErgonomically padded leather footbed for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with ergonomically placed textured lugs for absolute grip on various surfacesshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
